How It Works

From quote to delivery — we make vehicle shipping simple.

01

Request a Quote

Fill out our quick form with your vehicle and route details.

02

Get Matched

We connect you with the best vetted carrier for your route.

03

Vehicle Picked Up

Your carrier arrives, inspects, and loads your vehicle.

04

Safe Delivery

Track your shipment and receive your vehicle at the destination.

Why Choose Rastaman Logistics

USDOT #4536031 | MC-1799328

Vetted Carriers Only

Every carrier is fully insured, licensed, and verified before being assigned to your shipment.

Door-to-Door Service

We pick up and deliver your vehicle right to your specified locations — no terminals, no hassle.

Fast & Transparent

Get a quote in minutes with clear pricing. No hidden fees, no surprises — just reliable service.

FMCSA Licensed & Registered Broker

Our credentials can be verified directly through the official FMCSA database.

Get Your Free Quote

Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you with a competitive rate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our auto transport services.
